pages.text: You beat the dragon. The $(item)Dragon Trophy Skyseed$() is where the $(item)dragon egg$() belongs — a grand $(o)monument$(): a stepped end-stone dais, a purpur-capped pedestal, and four obsidian obelisks crowned with $(item)dragon heads$() that watch over it.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Bottle the $(item)dragon's breath$() from the fight (catch the lingering cloud in a glass bottle) — that, with $(item)end stone$() and $(item)obsidian$(), forges the seed. Plant it anywhere in the End, near your base.
The dragon's breath, ringed in obsidian and end stone.

$(bold)Crowning it$()$(br)The pedestal is left $(o)empty$() — set your one hard-won $(item)dragon egg$() on the purpur cap yourself (the egg is unique, so the monument never hands you a second). $(br2)A fitting end to the chapter: the dragon's heads keep watch, the egg on its plinth, and you with an $(item)elytra$() on your back.
